name: dmtool
description: Author, validate, and safely edit A12 Kernel document models — validation rules, computed fields, and model structure (fields, groups, type-defs, includes) — with the dmtool CLI. Bundles the native binary (downloaded on first use) + the authoring skill. Targets A12 Kernel 30.8.1 (A12 Tools 2025.06-ext5).
